StructurePhase.Reference: Gvozdetskii V., German N.V., Gladyshevskii R.E., Visn. L'viv. Derzh. Univ., Ser. Khim., v53 p12-19 (2012)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1229749. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: purified argon. Sample annealed at 773 K for 720 h in sealed evacuated quartz tube, quenched. Article Title: Phase equilibria in the systems Gd-Fe-(Ga,Ge)-Sb at 500 °C. Crystallographic parameters of the compounds GdFe2Ge2 and GdFe0.52Ge2. Wyckoff Sequence: c4. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Cadogan J.M., Ryan D.H., Cashion J.D., J. Phys.: Condens. Matter, v19 p1-9 (2007)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1217966. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: purified argon. Sample annealed at 1173 K for 14 d in sealed evacuated quartz tube, quenched. Article Title: 155Gd Mossbauer study of GdFe6Ge6. Temperature of Data Collection: 295 K. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: short interatomic distances for partly occupied sites. Wyckoff Sequence: g e c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Gvozdetskii V.Y., German N.V., Gladyshevskii R.E., Visn. L'viv. Derzh. Univ., Ser. Khim., v53 p12-19 (2012)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1229748. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS: Gd,Fe,Ge,Sb. COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon purified.THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 773 K for 720 h in sealed evacuated quartz tube, quenched. Wyckoff Sequence: e d a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Straumanis M.E., Aka E.Z., J. Appl. Phys., v23 p330 (1952)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 311292. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Ge. Article Title: Lattice Parameters, Coefficients of Thermal Expansion, and Atomic Weights of Purest Silicon and Germanium. Temperature of Data Collection: 293 K. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
